name: Muthoot Capital Services Limited
summary: Muthoot Capital Services Limited, a non-banking finance company (NBFC), provides fund and non-fund based financial services. The company offers two wheeler, used car, consumer durable, secured business, term, and loyalty loans; short-term and long-term deposit plans; and subordinated debts, as well as advisory services. It is also involved in buying loan portfolio of other NBFCs/micro finance companies. The company serves retail, corporate, and institutional customers through a network of branches in India. Muthoot Capital Services Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Kochi, India.
